stages.objective: Observe FIFO run-to-completion behavior for queued processes.
stages.goal: Identify convoy-like ordering directly from dispatch trace.
stages.theory_detail: FIFO chooses oldest ready process and keeps CPU ownership until block or exit.

hints.nudge: Locate first dispatch for each process.
hints.concept: FIFO may delay short jobs behind long jobs.
hints.explicit: Step through until both processes dispatch and compare start times.

stages.objective: Connect FIFO trace ordering to completion metrics.
stages.goal: Pass completion check while explaining FIFO tradeoffs.

hints.concept: Deterministic order does not imply fairness quality.
hints.explicit: Run until both jobs exit, then submit with trace evidence.

stages.objective: Apply alternative policy and compare against FIFO baseline.
stages.goal: Use tuning action to preserve completion while changing dispatch cadence.

hints.concept: Policy changes should affect cadence without violating completion.
hints.explicit: Apply policy, rerun same workload, and verify required checks.
